summary: Close the final beta.3 QA composition gap with one exact-CI-bound, no-soak Windows Sandbox walkthrough of every named M5/M6 capability and remove a startup race from the signed-installer repair proof.

externalInputs.purpose: Observed the exact-head Windows lifecycle startup race that motivated the bounded repair-proof correction.
Observed the aggregate Linux web-check timeout that established the hosted runner's 15-second PowerShell child-process startup budget was insufficient while the behavior script itself remained green.

providedInputs.label: Owner-provided ScadMill functional specification v0.6 with amendments

decisions.decision: Run one finite 34-capability M5/M6 walkthrough after the existing packaged evidence succeeds inside the same network-disabled Windows Sandbox, with N-2 disabled. Bind the cleanroom canonical application to the exact successful CI head and normalized signed-installer payload; host-rehash all retained evidence before PASS.
decisions.rationale: The remaining QA finding concerns package composition, not missing feature code. A single named, fail-closed composition inventory closes that gap without repeating the broad test program or adding a soak the owner explicitly removed.

decisions.decision: After the WebView shell is ready, poll for the exact recovered scratch source for at most 15 seconds before evaluating the retained application state.
decisions.rationale: The failed exact-head job retained the correct autosave bytes but read CodeMirror before asynchronous restoration completed. Waiting on the asserted state removes the harness race without weakening the state check.

decisions.decision: Raise only the windows-lifecycle-close child-process timeout from 15 to 30 seconds and its enclosing test timeout from 20 to 40 seconds.
decisions.rationale: Exact-head CI run 29970419179 timed out at the prior 15-second process limit under aggregate hosted-runner load, while the unchanged behavior script passed locally in 506 ms and the focused test completed in 390 ms. The correction preserves every assertion and failure path while allowing bounded process startup contention; it is not a soak or a retry loop.

testEvidence.criterion: The update/repair proof does not race asynchronous scratch restoration.
testEvidence.test: Require an awaited, bounded editor-source poll in the lifecycle harness.

red.outcome: RED: 1 test failed because the lifecycle harness read the editor immediately after the workspace shell appeared. Exact CI run 29969071803 had likewise failed at same-version repair while the autosave identity and bytes remained preserved.

green.outcome: GREEN: the focused lifecycle contract test passed after adding the bounded awaited source-restoration poll.

testEvidence.criterion: The M5/M6 walkthrough is sandbox-wired, fail-closed, and host-verifiable.
testEvidence.test: Verify all 34 ordered capability records, explicit evidence layers, source/application identity, manifest-bound exact-CI inputs, and retained PNG bytes.

red.outcome: RED: the new verifier and lifecycle tests passed, while the Sandbox wiring test failed because no M5/M6 runner was yet staged or invoked.

green.outcome: GREEN: 3 files and 5 tests passed after fail-closed Sandbox and host verification wiring.

testEvidence.criterion: The Windows lifecycle behavior test remains fail-closed under bounded hosted-runner process startup contention.
testEvidence.test: Run only the affected installer lifecycle contract after increasing its process-startup budget without changing assertions or adding retries.

red.outcome: RED: 1 of 1,741 web tests timed out exactly at the 15-second child-process limit; the failure was the PowerShell behavior-test launcher, not an assertion or product behavior failure.

green.outcome: GREEN: 1 file and 4 tests passed; the unchanged behavior script passed in 344 ms and the full focused run completed in 954 ms.

nearMisses.sought: Reuse the previously discarded walkthrough draft unchanged.
nearMisses.confirmation: The recovered draft contained a fatal installed-library selector and several evidence false positives. It was hardened before being wired and was not accepted on JSON shape alone.

attestation: No prohibited source was consulted in producing this change.
